title: 35650 Healthy Eating Omelette Maker/Non-Stick Marble Coated Ceramic Plates/Easy Clean/Automatic Temperature Control/Cool Touch Handle
features: HEALTHY OMELETTE MAKER – This healthy eating omelette maker allows you to cook two of the most delicious and super healthy omelettes, or separate portions of scrambled and fried eggs each and every time you use it!

MARBLE COATED HOT PLATES – The fact that this omelette maker features 2 non-stick marble coated ceramic hotplates means that you don’t need to use any oils in the cooking process, making it the healthy option at meal times. One the machine has cooled down you can simply wipe it clean.

TEMPERATURE CONTROLLED – The omelette maker features a red light on top of the machine that will let you know when the temperature is just right for cooking. This works alongside the cool touch handles that remain safe to touch for you throughout the cooking process, as well as the auto-lock clip that will ensure the mixture stays inside the moulds at all times.

HOW IT WORKS – Simply prepare your omelettes by whisking a few eggs, and adding your favoured choice of additional vegetables or cooked meats. The machine will then automatically bring itself to the perfect temperature, ready to cook your 2 omelettes within 5 to 6 minutes.

NUTRI-Q - Nutri-Q by Quest are the leading manufacturer of healthy cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Previous page Non-Stick Plates Each of the two hot plates are non-stick, making cooking healthier and cleaning easier. Indicator Lights Helpful indicator lights will tell you when the plates are warm, and when the omelettes are cooked. Locking Lid The lid features a locking clip, ensuring it safely stays in place during the cooking process. Automatic Temperature No settings are required, as the omelette maker will automatically cook at the right temperature. Additional Cooking As well as omelettes, you can also cook fried and scrambled eggs in the plates. Next page 1 Non-Stick Plates 2 Indicator Lights 3 Locking Lid 4 Automatic Temperature 5 Additional Cooking

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎2 Omelettes, Dual Zone Cooking, Eggs, Omelettes and More, Non Stick Coating, Scratch Resistant
